name: redline
description: Automatic code review, adversarial review, and rescue between Codex and Claude Code.

interface.shortDescription: Claude Opus reviews for Codex changes
interface.longDescription: Redline gives Codex users a symmetric review loop: a Stop hook nudges Codex when uncommitted changes exist, and Codex can ask Claude Code for standard review, adversarial review, or rescue help while keeping Codex in charge of any fixes.
defaultPrompt: Review my uncommitted changes with Claude
Ask Claude for rescue help on this bug
